ranked_movies.title: Pulp Fiction
ranked_movies.reason: Extensively discussed for its meta, self-aware filmmaking techniques, revolutionary impact on cinema, and cultural significance.

ranked_movies.title: 2001: A Space Odyssey
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently cited as a technically revolutionary and timeless masterpiece that remains impressive decades later.

ranked_movies.title: The Thing
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended in the 'stuck in one location' thread and often praised for its tension and practical effects.

ranked_movies.reason: A classic recommendation for films set primarily in one location, noted for its brilliant dialogue and tension.

ranked_movies.title: Goodfellas
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as a prime example of a film about a man's downward spiral and discussed for its impactful storytelling.

ranked_movies.title: Casino Royale
ranked_movies.reason: Debated for its cinematography compared to Skyfall, with many praising its filmic look and Eva Green's performance.

ranked_movies.title: Skyfall
ranked_movies.reason: Discussed alongside Casino Royale for its digital cinematography by Roger Deakins and visually stunning sequences.

ranked_movies.title: One Battle After Another

ranked_movies.title: Falling Down
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as the 'poster child' for films about a man in a downward spiral.

ranked_movies.title: Leaving Las Vegas
ranked_movies.reason: Praised for its brutal and accurate depiction of alcoholism and a man's self-destructive spiral.

ranked_movies.title: Coherence
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently suggested in the 'one location' thread for its clever sci-fi premise and execution.

ranked_movies.title: The Departed
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned in the 'bad guy pretends to be police' thread and discussed for its complex characters and plot.

ranked_movies.title: Terminator 2
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted as the most iconic example of a villain impersonating police, with a deep quote from James Cameron provided.

ranked_movies.title: Rear Window
ranked_movies.reason: A Hitchcock classic recommended for its masterful use of a single location to build suspense.

ranked_movies.title: Coraline
